title: One Battle After Another Editor Kisses Partner After Oscars Win in Viral Clip
text: Andy Jurgensen won the Oscar for Best Film Editing for One Battle After Another at the 2026 Academy Awards. The American film editor, known for his collaborations with director Paul Thomas Anderson, took home the Academy Award on Sunday night (15 March). During his acceptance, Jurgensen shared a hug and kiss with his partner before taking the stage. In his acceptance speech, he thanked his partner Bill, saying To my partner, Bill, who brings so much joy to my life every day. The moment was captured on camera and became a viral clip on social media, celebrating not only Jurgensen's professional achievement but also his personal happiness. Other nominees in the Best Editing category were Stephen Mirrione for F1, Ronald Bronstein and Josh Safdie for Marty Supreme, Olivier Bugge Coutté for Sentimental Value, and Michael P. Shawver for Sinners.
